'''ngamolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:averpenny|averpenny]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-m-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:averpenny|averpenny]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngamolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæmeleth|ngæmeleth]] || [[word:ngæmelej|ngæmelej]] || [[word:ngæmelesh|ngæmelesh]] || [[word:ngæmele|ngæmele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngamomoloth|ngamomoloth]] || [[word:ngamomoloj|ngamomoloj]] || [[word:ngamomolosh|ngamomolosh]] || [[word:ngamomolo|ngamomolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngamoloth|ngamoloth]] || [[word:ngamoloj|ngamoloj]] || [[word:ngamolosh|ngamolosh]] || [[word:ngamolo|ngamolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngamoflofth|ngamoflofth]] || [[word:ngamoflofj|ngamoflofj]] || [[word:ngamoflofsh|ngamoflofsh]] || [[word:ngamoflof|ngamoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngamolotho|ngamolotho]] || [[word:ngamolojo|ngamolojo]] || [[word:ngamolosho|ngamolosho]] || [[word:ngamoloko|ngamoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngamoloth|ngamoloth]] || [[word:ngamoloj|ngamoloj]] || [[word:ngamolosh|ngamolosh]] || [[word:ngamolo|ngamolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngamolothol|ngamolothol]] || [[word:ngamolojol|ngamolojol]] || [[word:ngamoloshol|ngamoloshol]] || [[word:ngamolokol|ngamolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngamoloothotho|ngamoloothotho]] || [[word:ngamoloojojo|ngamoloojojo]] || [[word:ngamolooshosho|ngamolooshosho]] || [[word:ngamolooko|ngamolooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngamolothon|ngamolothon]] || [[word:ngamolojon|ngamolojon]] || [[word:ngamoloshon|ngamoloshon]] || [[word:ngamolokon|ngamolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngamolothooro|ngamolothooro]] || [[word:ngamolojooro|ngamolojooro]] || [[word:ngamoloshooro|ngamoloshooro]] || [[word:ngamolokooro|ngamolokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|ebaeb35}}
